name: conduit
description: Generalized broadcast infrastructure: committed program frames from ANY signal-producing engine (visual, audio-reactive, generative) fanned out to every destination — HDMI/external displays, output windows, Syphon, NDI, record-to-disk. An app supplies an engine adapter and a host implementation (both contracts live here) and reuses the conduit verbatim. First tenants: Fold, Tap.
author: Daniel Nelson
